author: klim0v2652
content: and what is dependent_root for /eth/v2/validator/duties/proposer/{N}? Is it PreviousDutyDependentRoot?

author: sproul
content:
yep

- in v2 the Fulu dependent root for epoch N is: last slot of epoch `N - 2`
- in the head event, the `previous_dependent_root` is`get_block_root_at_slot(state, compute_start_slot_at_epoch(epoch - 1) - 1)`, i.e. start of `N - 1` - 1, which is the end of `N - 2` as well.

author: m.kalinin
content:
What do people think about introducing `ForkChoiceNode` since Phase0 and extending it in Gloas?
This makes signatures of all core FC functions stable across forks which will make work on FC test suites easier

author: potuz
content: I'm scared of this because of the following; we are effectively doing this on our forkchoice but for pre-gloas blocks we still base all calls in terms of block roots and post Gloas we use root for empty and hash for full. This decision of looking up differently for states in all caches is going to affect us until the fork. After that we can start getting rid of all previous forks gossip behavior and this backporting would be easier

author: potuz
content: If you want to change the signature but only check roots and disregard Payload content I think that would be even better than different signatures for us
